title: Highest-Volume edge (Pro Swing Ep 2)
rules_high_confidence: Volume bar = MAX(volume, last 252 bars) — highest in past year
Optionally: highest since last earnings (proxy: top vol bar in last 60-90 days)
Confirmed: tag price-action setup (gap, breakout, etc.)
known_strengths: Deterministic Spec — Highest Volume Edge ProSwing 1D (QL_HIGHEST_VOLUME_EDGE_PROSWING_1D)
known_weaknesses:
Parity candidate. Not approved for live trading. Strong conceptually; needs robust
highest-volume detection that filters outliers.
